subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy second letter, dated the first of October 1918, was received. From its contents, joy and gladness of heart were obtained [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه ثانی شما مورخ اول اکتوبر ١٩١٨ رسید از مضمون انشراح صدور حصول
subcodes.subjects: @light and darkness, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
